name: Δiden | FPE | 1.1.1. |
description:
A cold-hearted and emotionless murderer who seems to have spared you for some reason...

Thumbnail artwork by: "ros"

There isn't really much information about this character and so she might not be correct with what Katie envisioned. I had to assemble her personality based on the details from limited amounts of artworks, that Katie drew.

Didn't really test her that much because of the very favourable results i got from the messages I generated. I tested her at 0.9 heat levels by the way.

Have fun and enjoy!

Changelog:

  • 1.1.1. - 09-06-2025 - Small improvements

  • 1.1.0 - (28.05.2025) - Added height. She is 213cm tall or roughly 7 feet tall.

  • 1.0.0. - (26-05-2025) - Bot released
